_meta.name: Generic Connector Action Template
_meta.description: Template for any OpenApiConnection action. Fill in connector, operationId, and parameters. Includes all optional fields documented.

placeholders.{{CONN_REF_LOGICAL}}: Connection reference logical name from Dataverse

_notes.retry_policy: Optional. Types: none, fixed, exponential. Remove retryPolicy block if not needed.
_notes.parameters: Key-value pairs specific to the operation. Check connector docs for required params.

common_connectors.shared_office365: Outlook — send email, get events, manage contacts
common_connectors.shared_sharepointonline: SharePoint — CRUD list items, get files

_notes.timeout: Add "timeout": "PT30S" to inputs to set action-level timeout (ISO 8601 duration).
